string.description: name of the AuthenticationPolicy
resource content will be returned as it was at the time of this git hash
the namespace scope in which to operate

bool.description: When set to True, a reject of an authentication server will result in the user being denied access. When set to False, upon reject the node will try the next authentication method in the authentication order.

string.description: Local authentication priority.

list.description: List of ServerGroups that define the order in which authentication happens.

single_nested.description: Authentication order.

int64.description: Determines how long a user can be idle for before they are logged out (in minutes). When set to zero, users are never logged out.
How many failed login attempts are allowed, set to zero for unlimited attempts.
How many minutes the user will be locked out for, set to zero for indefinite (until manually unlocked).
The time window for failed attempts to occur in (in minutes).

single_nested.description: Lockout policy.

list.description: Selects TopoNodes on which to configure the AuthenticationPolicy.
List of TopoNodes on which to configure the AuthenticationPolicy.

bool.description: Whether to allow the username to be part of the password.

int64.description: The maximum length of sequential characters in the password. For example, abcd is a sequence of 4 sequential keys.
The minimum length of the password.
The minimum amount of lowercase characters in the password.
The minimum amount of numeric characters in the password.
The minimum amount of special characters in the password.
The minimum amount of uppercase characters in the password.
How many repeated characters are allowed.

single_nested.description: Password complexity rules.
An AuthenticationPolicy defines parameters that relate to node users, such as password complexity, lockout timers, and the order in which authentication methods are attempted on the node.

list.description: List of nodes this authentication policy has been applied to

single_nested.description: AuthenticationPolicyStatus defines the observed state of AuthenticationPolicy.

string.description: a comma-separated list of resource fields to fetch/return.  If unspecified, all fields are fetched.  If empty, only key-fields are fetched.
an EQL "where" expression that will be used to filter the set of resources returned.
A label selector string to filter the results based on resource labels. If specified multiple times, the union of resources which satisfy a label-selector will be returned.
Deprecated: a label selector string to filter the results based on CR labels
the namespace scope in which to operate

string.description: name of the NodeGroup
resource content will be returned as it was at the time of this git hash
the namespace scope in which to operate
Set the local name for this group. If not provided, the resource name will be used.
Set the action for this entry.

Set the match for this entry. This is a string to match input against - for example "interface" for srl or "configure port" for sros.
Rules here should be specified in the target specific format.

Operating system to match against for this rule.
Operating system to deploy this rule to.

list.description: Enabled services for this group

bool.description: Make members of this group superusers.

int64.description: Set the privilege level for this group.

single_nested.description: TACACS configuration.

NodeGroup is a representation of a group on a node, including the services it has access to, any RBAC, and TACACS configuration.
NodeGroups are deployed to nodes by NodeUser or other permission-consuming resources.

list.description: List of TopoNodes group has been deployed to.

single_nested.description: Deployment status of this NodeGroup.

Deprecated: a label selector string to filter the results based on CR labels

string.description: name of the ServerGroup
resource content will be returned as it was at the time of this git hash
the namespace scope in which to operate
Address of the AAA server, must be either IPv4 or IPv6, or an FQDN.
Secret used for the AAA server.

list_nested.description: The AAA servers that are part of this ServerGroup.

list.description: Label selector for NodeGroup resources to deploy on the node for this ServerGroup.
Which NodeGroup resources to deploy on the node for this ServerGroup.

int64.description: Accounting port of the Radius server(s).
Authentication port of the Radius server(s).
Retransmit attempts per Radius server.

single_nested.description: RADIUS parameters.

string.description: Kind of the router used to reach the AAA servers.

int64.description: Tacacs server port.

bool.description: Whether to enable TACACS+ privilege level authorization.

single_nested.description: TACACS+ parameters.

int64.description: Timeout in seconds that the node will wait for a response from the AAA server before retrying or continuing to the next server in the group.

string.description: Select the type of all servers in the ServerGroup. Can either be Radius or Tacacs.

single_nested.description: The ServerGroup defines a list of AAA servers to be used for authentication, authorization, and accounting. It includes settings for both Radius and Tacacs servers, although each ServerGroup is limited to servers of a single type. The ServerGroup is deployed onto nodes using the label selector.

int64.description: Indicates the health score of the ServerGroup. The health score of the ServerGroup is determined by the aggregate health score of all servers in this group on all nodes.

string.description: Indicates the reason for the health score.
The time when the state of the resource last changed.

list.description: List of nodes this ServerGroup has been applied to

string.description: Operational state of the ServerGroup.  The operational state of the ServerGroup is determined by monitoring the operational state of all servers in this group on all nodes.

single_nested.description: ServerGroupStatus defines the observed state of ServerGroup.
